major.intro: Rewatch the Major playoffs in 2D, match by match. The demos are already parsed and live in the project repo: hit watch and the replay is downloaded on the spot.

about.title: About the project
about.tagline: A 2D replay viewer for Counter-Strike 2 demos that runs entirely in your browser.
about.motivationBody: I had been using other tools to analyze demos, but they all took a lot of setup to get running: installing a database, spinning up a Docker container, configuring all sorts of things. In practice I was usually the only one who could get it all working; my friends couldn't. I wanted something simple that anyone could just open and use. And none of those tools had a good visual experience. Over the years I kept improving at UI/UX and front-end development, so I wanted to build a tool with the experience I always wished I had: open a .dem file and rewatch the match in 2D, round by round, right in your browser, without installing anything. Back when I was in college, WebAssembly was released, and ever since I'd dreamed of having a real reason to use it. This project finally gave me one, and I was thrilled by the power it brought: the parser runs entirely inside the browser. Everything is parsed locally on your machine, and not a single byte of the demo leaves your browser.
about.authorBody: Built by {name}, a developer from Brazil. The project is open-source precisely so it can grow with the community's support: suggestions, ideas and bug reports are very welcome on GitHub.
about.creditsBody: This project stands on the shoulders of great open-source work:
about.relatedBody: Projects that inspired this one and are worth checking out:

analyzer.title: Analyze demo
analyzer.subtitleB: file from CS2 and rewatch the match in 2D, round by round. Everything runs locally, in your browser.
analyzer.recentNote: History is kept only in your browser. Reopening a demo does not re-upload it.
analyzer.localNote: Processing happens in your browser. The demo is not sent to any server.
analyzer.importHint: A .cs2dv file exported from this app

viewer.autoZoomDesc: Frames all players on the map
viewer.autoAdvanceDesc: When a round ends, the next one starts on its own
viewer.skipFreezeDesc: When switching rounds, start right after the freeze time

comment.modeHint: Click the map to leave a comment

coach.modeHint: Pick a tool and draw on the map

grenades.empty: No grenades for the current filters.
grenades.hint: Hover a grenade to isolate its trajectory · click to open it in the replay

utilities.empty: No utility data for this demo.

flash.matrixHint: Row blinded column: total duration in seconds (allies included)
flash.empty: This demo records no blind events. GOTV/HLTV demos (such as Majors) usually omit this information, so flash stats cannot be computed. This is not an error.
flash.impactHint: Enemies blinded who died while blind from your flash (real payoff)

damage.hint: Damage from HE and molotov (utility kills included)

heatmap.title: Heatmap
heatmap.multiLevelNote: {map} has two floors: each plot shows one level.

economy.startMoneyHint: Cash available at the start of each round, before buying
economy.equipValueHint: Value each team has equipped in the round (weapons, utility and armor)
